steps.title: Identify the aim
steps.content: The notes state that Rao's team wanted to better understand the mechanics behind bird nests' flexible yet cohesive structural properties. That sentence directly gives the research study's primary aim.

steps.title: Separate aim from method
steps.content: B describes the model and analysis method. C describes a finding from the experiment. D describes the structures being studied but not why the team studied them. The choice that states the reason for the study is the aim. The answer is A.
